description: THE LINDEN – a collection of 10 modern townhomes in the heart of Moodyville, only 4 homes remaining! Unit 6 is 1,682 sqft of spacious 3-bed, 4-bath corner home offering abundant natural light. Designed by Cornerstone Architects and built to Passive House Standards, this home delivers exceptional year-round comfort with energy efficiency. The flexible lock-off studio is ideal as a mortgage helper, guest suite, or private office. Inside, expansive windows brighten the living spaces, while premium finishes and high-quality appliances elevate everyday living. The primary bedroom features a private balcony, perfect for morning coffee. Located mins from Lower Lonsdale Quay you’re steps to shops, and restaurants, with city views and North Shore trails right outside your door.
